sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Carmel mual ah Pasian gualzawhna te muding in
Hongpai mite Topa'n thupha hong pia hen
Elijah bang Pasian gualzawhna te muding in
Carmel mualah Topa'n thupha hong pia hen

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kha khanlawh na meibang in hong tawh kik in Topa
Khasiangtho aw hihmun ah kong muak uh hi
Ko aa dingin na lamdang leh na vangliat nate
Hong musak in na thupha kongmuak uh hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa ading khut kilen in nasem khawm veni
Na septheih bang Topa'n thupha hong pia hen
Elijah bang Pasian gualzawhna te mu ding in
Topa gamzai na dingin pang ciat ve ni
